task_completion.description: Navigate to the custom field creation screen for projects
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenProject administration area with a 'New custom field' form specifically for Projects.

task_completion.description: Set the custom field name to 'Owning Region' and format to 'List'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name input field contains 'Owning Region' and the Format dropdown is set to 'List'.

task_completion.description: Add the required geographical region options
task_completion.visual_evidence: The options 'North America', 'EMEA', and 'APAC' are visible in the list of options for the custom field.

task_completion.description: Enable the custom field for all projects
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'For all projects' checkbox is checked on the custom field configuration page.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Mobile Banking App' project
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Mobile Banking App' project interface, such as the project overview or project settings page.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'EMEA' region to the 'Mobile Banking App' project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Owning Region' field is set to 'EMEA' within the 'Mobile Banking App' project details or settings, with evidence of the change being saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenProject web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenProject web UI rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local OpenProject URL and the standard OpenProject interface is visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to directly modify the database
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running SQL commands or database management tools are used to alter the project or custom field data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom field must be named 'Owning Region' with type 'List' and exactly three options: 'North America', 'EMEA', and 'APAC'. It must be enabled for all projects. The target project is 'Mobile Banking App' (identifier: mobile-banking-app), and its 'Owning Region' must be set to 'EMEA'.
